title: SKQ1
description: SkQ1 (plastoquinonyl-decyltriphenylphosphonium) is a mitochondria-targeted antioxidant that combines a lipophilic cation with plastoquinone to selectively accumulate in mitochondria and neutralize reactive oxygen species. It was developed by Professor Vladimir Skulachev and has been primarily studied for age-related conditions, particularly dry eye disease and corneal damage, with some evidence for broader anti-aging effects.

research.title: Effects of the mitochondria-targeted antioxidant SkQ1 on lifespan of rodents
research.summary: Study demonstrated that SkQ1 extended lifespan in various rodent models and reduced age-related alterations in multiple organ systems, supporting its potential as an anti-aging intervention.

research.title: Mitochondria-targeted antioxidant SkQ1 reduces age-related alterations in the ultrastructure of the lacrimal gland
research.summary: SkQ1 treatment reduced age-related ultrastructural changes in lacrimal glands, suggesting protective effects against age-related dry eye disease at the cellular level.

research.title: Mitochondria-targeted antioxidant SKQ1 protects cornea from oxidative damage induced by ultraviolet irradiation and mechanical injury
research.summary: SkQ1 eye drops accelerated corneal healing approximately 2-fold in both UV-induced and mechanical injury models by reducing oxidative stress and preventing loss of keratocytes.

research.title: Retinoprotective Effect of SkQ1, Visomitin Eye Drops, Is Associated with Suppression of P38 MAPK and ERK1/2 Signaling Pathways Activity
research.summary: Visomitin eye drops containing SkQ1 demonstrated retinoprotective effects through suppression of stress-related MAPK signaling pathways, suggesting therapeutic potential for retinal conditions.

sentiment.summary: Users express significant interest in SkQ1's potential as an anti-aging compound and report positive experiences with Visomitin eye drops for dry eye conditions. While availability is limited and there's a lack of extensive anecdotal reports, those who have used it report noticeable improvements in eye health.

effects.label: Clinical Evidence:
effects.description: Multiple clinical trials funded by the manufacturer showed improvements in dry eye syndrome symptoms

effects.label: Animal Studies:
effects.description: Demonstrated consistent benefits across various rodent models for lifespan extension and age-related conditions

effects.label: Eye Applications:
effects.description: Most robust evidence exists for ophthalmic applications, particularly for dry eye and corneal protection

effects.label: Limited Human Data:
effects.description: While approved for dry eye in some countries, broader anti-aging effects in humans require more research

dosage.label: Eye Drops:
dosage.description: Visomitin eye drops containing 5 μg/ml SkQ1 used as topical ophthalmic solution for dry eye treatment

dosage.label: Research Concentrations:
dosage.description: Studies used 7.5 μM SkQ1 for corneal protection in animal models

dosage.label: Systemic Dosing:
dosage.description: Animal longevity studies used various concentrations, but equivalent human oral doses are not well-established

dosage.label: Application Frequency:
dosage.description: For eye drops, users apply 1-2 drops several times daily as needed for dry eye symptoms

sideEffects.label: Limited Reporting:
sideEffects.description: Very few side effects reported in available clinical trials and user experiences

sideEffects.label: Eye Irritation:
sideEffects.description: Minimal reports of temporary irritation with eye drop formulation

sideEffects.label: Unknown Long-term Effects:
sideEffects.description: Long-term safety data in humans for systemic use is limited

sideEffects.label: Generally Well-Tolerated:
sideEffects.description: Most users report good tolerance with the ophthalmic formulation

availability.label: Limited Availability:
availability.description: Difficult to acquire in many countries, primarily available in Russia and select European markets

availability.label: Visomitin Brand:
availability.description: SkQ1 is marketed as Visomitin eye drops for dry eye treatment in approved regions

availability.label: Research Compound:
availability.description: Not widely available as a supplement for general anti-aging purposes outside of eye drop formulation
